# Every file the published npm tarball is allowed to contain, one per
# line, sorted. CI fails on any drift in either direction (see
# scripts/verify-pack.mjs). The files allowlist in package.json bounds
# what CAN ship; this list asserts what DOES ship, catching the class
# of accidental disclosure an allowlist misses — a tsconfig change that
# starts emitting extra outputs, or new tooling dropping a config into
# dist/. Adding a source file? Add its dist/ outputs here in the same PR.
CHANGELOG.md
LICENSE
README.md
config.schema.json
dist/index.d.ts
dist/index.js
dist/index.js.map
dist/nwsClient.d.ts
dist/nwsClient.js
dist/nwsClient.js.map
dist/platform.d.ts
dist/platform.js
dist/platform.js.map
dist/platformAccessory.d.ts
dist/platformAccessory.js
dist/platformAccessory.js.map
dist/settings.d.ts
dist/settings.js
dist/settings.js.map
dist/stationCache.d.ts
dist/stationCache.js
dist/stationCache.js.map
package.json
